productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex New York Original Digital Red Watch
description: Product descriptionA hot favourite among the casually stylish, the adidas New york Original digital wrist watch is a great buy for those who enjoy performance and style. With excellent touches and grooved comfort, this watch from adidas makes for an excellent buy as a daily wear.Case diameter: 50 mmCase thickness: 12 mmDial shape: Rectangular with curved sidesRed resin case with a red rubber strap and white graffiti for added durability, style, comfort Fixed red resin bezel with Adidas logo  for added style and comfort Grooved strap for snug Fit and comfort wear, allowing ventilationBlack digital dial displaying hours, minutes, seconds, time in am/pm format, date and day of the weekQuartz movement of time display using a paper-thin piece of synthetic quartz to ensure accurate time measurementScratch resistant mineral crystal to keep your watch safe and well protected for years to comeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityTang clasp to keep the watch firm in place as a belt buckle10 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance  at 50 meters or 165 feet, allowing you to use it even when snorkelling, skin-diving, and swimming10 Lap memory that allows the watch to record upto 10 laps. The watch divides its readings into sessions and provides average, best and local time. You may either rename these sessions or they will hold default names such as set 1, set 2, etc.Interval Timer to daisy chain differnt times lengths and alert you at the end of each segment. This will automatically repeat the sequence until it is stopped manually10 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance  at Digital alarm in any time zone
